_meta.name: maturing-cohorts
_meta.explanation: Cohort-gate test. Meta has an extreme cpaD7 (800) that would trip BOTH the cpa_d7 z-score AND the cpa_d7 percent-delta detectors. Both must be suppressed because Meta sub_d7 = 5 is below COHORT_D7_MATURITY_THRESHOLD = 10. Unity Ads spend z-score still fires because spend has no cohort dependency.

expectedFindings.rationale: Same spend distribution as recent-period. Unity Ads at 1000 vs cluster around 100 fires z >= 2.0.
